details: The agent correctly retrieved the 10 most recently merged PRs using search, extracted titles and authors, then fetched actual check run data for all 10 PRs. The final answer lists all 10 PRs with per-PR CI status, correctly identifying PR #51146 as the one with a failed check (the 'check' job showed conclusion='failure' in the raw data), and accurately reporting 9/10 as fully green CI.
